title: Sprint Planning — Noisy Remote Call
summary: The team is fixing a login bug by Friday. Sarah will work on the API. Marcus will write a document about how sign-in works by Wednesday. The old dashboard stays for now; the new design comes later. Alex will email stakeholders after the meeting.

chunks.speaker: Alex (PM)
chunks.text: Okay, let's recap. We need the login fix shipped by Friday. Sarah owns the API piece.

chunks.speaker: Sarah (Dev)
chunks.text: Uh, I can do the API, but we should probably sync with Marcus on the auth flow before I start.

chunks.speaker: Jordan (Design)
chunks.text: Sorry, quick question — are we keeping the old dashboard or switching to the new one?

chunks.speaker: Alex (PM)
chunks.text: Good question. Let's keep the old dashboard for v1. Redesign is Q2.

chunks.speaker: Sarah (Dev)
chunks.text: Got it. So we'll need to refactor the OAuth callback handler for the IdP integration. Marcus should document the flow.

chunks.speaker: Alex (PM)
chunks.text: Agreed. Marcus, can you have the auth doc ready by Wednesday?

chunks.speaker: Sarah (Dev)
chunks.text: I'll block time tomorrow to review it with him.

chunks.speaker: Jordan (Design)
chunks.text: Works for me. I'll update the Figma with the v1 dashboard labels only.

chunks.speaker: Alex (PM)
chunks.text: Perfect. So to summarize: login fix by Friday, Sarah on API, Marcus on auth doc by Wednesday, dashboard stays as-is for v1. I'll send a stakeholder email after this call.
